title: aspidium articulatum
intro: Aspidium articulatum, also known as the Ruffled Shield Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Aspidium articulatum include its potential to treat various ailments such as arthritis, fever, and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's fronds are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
